notes: DESI field and mock cubes are frozen (fiducial build); only the filtration mask varies, identically on both sides. Threshold variants are nested subsets of the fiducial interior; mean-subtraction region is the fiducial interior for both, preserving like-for-like. A full rebuild per mask would additionally re-center each field; declared as a second-order effect.
verdict_criterion: model-free: DESI z < -3.0 and rank <= 3 in every mask variant. Absolute loop-count swing is NOT used (it scales with masked volume; DESI and mocks fall together).
verdict_note: The anomaly survives every mask variant: DESI stays at rank 1-2/k with z from -6.3 to -8.3, and the fractional deficit is 20-29% throughout - growing slightly under stricter thresholds, so the fiducial mask is conservative rather than inflating the deficit. Eroding the boundary does not remove the deficit, so it is not a boundary-skin artefact.
